name: Physiology
description: An advanced, comprehensive study of human systems physiology, covering cellular function, cardiovascular dynamics, renal regulation, neurobiology, and endocrine feedback.

topics.name: Functional Organization of the Body and Homeostasis
topics.description: Introduction to homeostasis, intercellular organization, control systems, and the concept of the internal environment.

subtopics.name: Cells as the Living Units of the Body
Extracellular Fluid—The "Internal Environment"
Homeostatic Mechanisms of the Major Functional Systems
Control Systems of the Body
Automaticity of the Body

topics.name: Cellular Anatomy and Functional Systems
topics.description: The physical structure of the animal cell, organelles, endocytosis, and cellular locomotion.

subtopics.name: Organization and Physical Structure of the Cell
Comparison of the Animal Cell with Precellular Forms of Life
Functional Systems of the Cell
Locomotion of Cells

topics.name: Genetic Control and Cellular Life Cycles
topics.description: DNA transcription, translation, genetic regulation of cell reproduction, differentiation, apoptosis, and oncogenesis.

subtopics.name: Genes in the Cell Nucleus
The DNA-RNA Transcription Process
Translation and Synthesis of Cellular Substances
Control of Gene Function and Biochemical Activity in Cells
Genetic Control of Cell Reproduction
Cell Differentiation, Apoptosis, and Cancer

topics.name: Membrane Transport Physiology
topics.description: The kinetics of simple/facilitated diffusion and active transport across the lipid bilayer.

subtopics.name: The Lipid Barrier of the Cell Membrane and Transport Proteins
Simple and Facilitated Diffusion Mechanics
Primary and Secondary Active Transport

topics.name: Membrane Potentials and Action Potentials
topics.description: The biophysics of resting membrane potentials, signal propagation, and excitation of excitable tissues.

subtopics.name: Basic Physics of Resting Membrane Potentials
Nerve Action Potentials and Propagation
Re-establishing Ionic Gradients and Energy Metabolism
Excitation and the Process of Eliciting the Action Potential

topics.name: Skeletal Muscle Contraction and Excitation
topics.description: Sliding filament theory, molecular energetics, and excitation-contraction coupling at the neuromuscular junction.

subtopics.name: Physiologic Anatomy of Skeletal Muscle
Molecular and Chemical Mechanisms of Contraction
Energetics and Mechanics of Whole Muscle Contraction
The Neuromuscular Junction and Acetylcholine Dynamics
Excitation-Contraction Coupling
Neuromuscular Pharmacology and Myasthenia Gravis

topics.name: Smooth Muscle Physiology
topics.description: Multi-unit and unitary smooth muscle, contraction mechanics, and neural/hormonal control.

subtopics.name: Molecular Mechanisms of Smooth Muscle Contraction
Nervous and Hormonal Control of Smooth Muscle Contraction

topics.name: Cardiac Muscle and the Heart as a Pump
topics.description: Myocardial electrophysiology, cardiac cycle mechanics, heart sounds, and pump regulation.

subtopics.name: Physiology of Cardiac Muscle
The Cardiac Cycle and Valvular Mechanics
Cardiac Work Output and Oxygen Utilization
Intrinsic and Extrinsic Regulation of Heart Pumping

topics.name: Cardiac Conduction and the Normal ECG
topics.description: The specialized conduction system, pacemakers, and recording principles of the standard electrocardiogram.

subtopics.name: Specialized Conductive System of the Heart
Control of Excitation and Conduction in the Heart
Electrocardiogram Characteristics and Recording
Electrocardiographic Leads

topics.name: Advanced Electrocardiography and Vectorial Analysis
topics.description: Vectorial analysis of normal and abnormal ECGs, axis deviations, currents of injury, and arrhythmias.

subtopics.name: Principles and Analysis of the Normal Vector ECG
Mean Electrical Axis of the Ventricular QRS
Abnormal QRS Voltage, Prolonged Patterns, and Currents of Injury
Cardiac Arrhythmias and Electrocardiographic Interpretation

topics.name: Hemodynamics: Pressure, Flow, and Resistance
topics.description: Physical principles of the circulatory system, vascular resistance, compliance, and arterial/venous dynamics.

subtopics.name: Physical Characteristics and Principles of Circulation
Interrelationships of Pressure, Flow, and Resistance
Vascular Distensibility and Arterial Pressure Pulsations
Veins and Their Functions

topics.name: The Microcirculation and Lymphatic System
topics.description: Capillary fluid filtration dynamics, interstitial fluid, and lymphatic drainage.

subtopics.name: Capillary Structure and Vasomotion
Capillary Exchange of Nutrients and Fluid
Starling Forces Governing Fluid Filtration Across Capillaries
Lymphatic System Kinetics and Lymph Flow

topics.name: Neural and Humoral Regulation of the Circulation
topics.description: Local intrinsic control of blood flow, vasoconstrictor/vasodilator humoral factors, and central autonomic control of arterial pressure.

subtopics.name: Local Control of Tissue Blood Flow in Response to Metabolic Needs
Humoral Control of the Circulation
Nervous Regulation and Rapid Baroreceptor Control of Pressure

topics.name: Renal and Hormonal Control of Blood Pressure
topics.description: Long-term arterial pressure control through fluid volume balance and the renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system (RAAS).

subtopics.name: Renal-Body Fluid System for Arterial Pressure Control
The Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone System (RAAS)
Integrated Multifaceted System for Pressure Regulation and Hypertension

topics.name: Cardiac Output, Venous Return, and Exercise Hemodynamics
topics.description: Frank-Starling curves, venous return pathways, coronary blood flow, and systemic adaptations to exercise.

subtopics.name: Intrinsic and Extrinsic Control of Cardiac Output and Venous Return
Methods for Measuring Cardiac Output
Muscle Blood Flow and Coronary Circulation During Exercise

topics.name: Cardiovascular Pathophysiology: Failure, Valvular Lesions, and Shock
topics.description: Hemodynamic consequences of heart failure, valvular/congenital lesions, and the shock state.

subtopics.name: Circulatory Dynamics in Cardiac Failure and Cardiogenic Shock
Valvular and Congenital Heart Defects and Cardiac Sounds
Physiologic Causes, Classes, and Treatment of Circulatory Shock

topics.name: Body Fluid Compartments, Osmolarity, and Edema
topics.description: Measurement of fluid spaces, fluid shifts, hyponatremia/hypernatremia, and intercellular/extracellular edema mechanics.

subtopics.name: Extracellular and Intracellular Fluid Compartments and Blood Volume
The Indicator-Dilution Principle for Measuring Fluid Volumes
Osmotic Equilibrium Between Intracellular and Extracellular Fluids
Clinical Fluid Abnormalities: Hyponatremia, Hypernatremia, and Edema

topics.name: Renal Anatomy, Micturition, and Glomerular Filtration
topics.description: Nephron structure, bladder mechanics, micturition pathways, and glomerular filtration rate (GFR) regulation.

subtopics.name: Physiologic Anatomy of the Kidney and Nephron
Micturition, Bladder Mechanics, and the Micturition Reflex
Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) and Renal Blood Flow Dynamics
Autoregulation of GFR and Renal Blood Flow

topics.name: Renal Tubular Reabsorption and Secretion
topics.description: Mechanisms of transport along the PCT, loop of Henle, DCT, and collecting ducts, plus clearance calculations.

subtopics.name: Passive and Active Mechanisms of Tubular Reabsorption
Reabsorption and Secretion Along Specific Nephron Segments
Regulation of Tubular Reabsorption
Use of Clearance Methods to Quantify Kidney Function

topics.name: Osmolarity, Water, and Electrolyte Balance
topics.description: Countercurrent multiplier system, ADH feedback, thirst regulation, and renal management of electrolytes.

subtopics.name: Renal Mechanisms for Excreting Dilute or Concentrated Urine
Osmoreceptor-ADH Feedback and Thirst Mechanisms
Renal Regulation of Potassium, Calcium, Phosphate, and Magnesium
Pressure Natriuresis and Integrated Sodium Balance

topics.name: Acid-Base Regulation and Renal Disorders
topics.description: Bicarbonate/phosphate/protein buffers, respiratory/renal compensations, diuretics, and pathophysiology of acute/chronic renal failure.

subtopics.name: Chemical Buffering Systems of the Body Fluids
Respiratory and Renal Regulation of Acid-Base Balance
Clinical Assessment and Analysis of Acidosis and Alkalosis
Diuretics and Their Mechanisms of Action
Acute and Chronic Renal Failure Pathophysiology and Dialysis

topics.name: Erythrocytes, Leukocytes, and Inflammation
topics.description: Erythropoiesis, anemia, kinetics of granulocytes/monocytes, and tissue inflammation pathways.

subtopics.name: Red Blood Cells, Erythropoiesis, Anemia, and Polycythemia
Leukocyte Kinetics and the Monocyte-Macrophage System
Mechanisms of Tissue Inflammation and Cellular Chemotaxis
Leukopenia and Leukemias

topics.name: Immunology, Blood Typing, and Hemostasis
topics.description: Innate/acquired immunity, allergy, blood typing, organ transplantation, and coagulation cascades.

subtopics.name: Innate and Acquired (Adaptive) Immunity
Allergy, Hypersensitivity, and Autoimmunity
O-A-B and Rh Blood Types and Transfusion Reactions
Mechanisms of Hemostasis and Blood Coagulation
Clinical Coagulopathies and Anticoagulants

topics.name: Pulmonary Mechanics and Circulation
topics.description: Ventilation mechanics, lung volumes, pulmonary hemodynamics, and capillary fluid exchange.

subtopics.name: Mechanics of Pulmonary Ventilation and Pressures
Pulmonary Volumes, Capacities, and Alveolar Ventilation
Pulmonary Hemodynamics and Blood Flow Distribution
Pulmonary Capillary Dynamics and Pleural Fluid

topics.name: Respiratory Gas Exchange and Transport
topics.description: Diffusion physics, gas partial pressures, ventilation-perfusion ratios, and chemical transport of O2 and CO2.

subtopics.name: Physics of Gas Diffusion and the Respiratory Membrane
The Ventilation-Perfusion Ratio (V/Q)
Blood Transport of Oxygen and Carbon Dioxide
The Respiratory Exchange Ratio

topics.name: Regulation of Respiration and Insufficiency
topics.description: Brain stem respiratory centers, chemical/peripheral controls, exercise adjustments, and respiratory failure states.

subtopics.name: The Respiratory Center and Neural Ventilation Control
Chemical and Peripheral Chemoreceptor Control of Breathing
Regulation of Respiration During Exercise
Pathophysiology of Respiratory Insufficiency, Hypoxia, and Hypercapnia

topics.name: Aviation, Space, and Hyperbaric Physiology
topics.description: Effects of low barometric pressure, zero gravity, and underwater deep-sea diving on gases and human tissues.

subtopics.name: Aviation, High-Altitude, and Space Physiology
Physiology of Deep-Sea Diving and Hyperbaric Conditions

topics.name: Neurophysiology: Synaptic Transmission and Receptors
topics.description: The structural levels of CNS, synaptic mechanisms, sensory transduction, and spatial/temporal summation.

subtopics.name: General Design of the Nervous System and Major CNS Levels
Central Nervous System Synapses and Neurotransmitters
Sensory Receptors and Transduction of Stimuli
Signal Transmission, Circuits, and Summation in Neuronal Pools

topics.name: Somatic Sensations: Tactile, Position, Pain, and Temperature
topics.description: Somatic sensory pathways (Dorsal-Lemniscal, Anterolateral), central pain pathways, analgesia systems, and thermal reception.

subtopics.name: Detection and Transmission of Tactile and Position Sensations
Dorsal Column-Medial Lemniscal and Anterolateral Systems
Pain Receptors, Dual CNS Pain Pathways, and Referred Pain
Pain Suppression (Analgesia), Headaches, and Thermal Sensations

topics.name: Special Senses: Optics, Retina, and Central Vision
topics.description: Optics of vision, intraocular fluid, retinal photochemistry, color pathways, and visual cortical areas.

subtopics.name: Physical Optics of Vision and Intraocular Fluid Dynamics
Photochemistry of the Retina and Color Vision
Neural Function of the Retina
Visual Pathways, Cortical Processing, and Oculomotor Control

topics.name: Special Senses: Audition, Taste, and Olfaction
topics.description: Cochlear fluid/hair cell mechanics, central auditory processing, gustatory transduction, and olfactory pathways.

subtopics.name: Tympanic Membrane and Cochlear Hair Cell Mechanics
Central Auditory Mechanisms and Hearing Loss
Physiological Mechanisms of Taste and Smell

topics.name: Spinal Reflexes and Brain Stem Motor Control
topics.description: Spinal cord motor circuits, muscle spindles/Golgi tendon organs, pyramidal system, and brain stem maintenance of equilibrium.

subtopics.name: Spinal Cord Motor Circuits, Muscle Spindles, and Tendon Organs
Spinal Cord Reflexes (Flexor, Withdrawal) and Spinal Shock
The Motor Cortex and Corticospinal (Pyramidal) Tract
Brain Stem Motor Control, Vestibular System, and Equilibrium

topics.name: Cerebellar, Basal Ganglia, and Cerebral Cortical Integration
topics.description: Cerebellar processing loops, basal ganglia pathways, functional cortical areas, language generation, and memory consolidation.

subtopics.name: Cerebellum Neural Circuits and Motor Coordination
Basal Ganglia Functional Pathways and Clinical Deficits
Functional Anatomy of the Cerebral Cortex and Language
Physiologic Mechanisms of Thought, Consciousness, and Memory

topics.name: Limbic System, States of Brain Activity, and Autonomic Control
topics.description: Limbic/hypothalamic behavioral headquarters, sleep-wake cycles, Sympathetic/Parasympathetic pharmacology, and CSF dynamics.

subtopics.name: The Limbic System and Hypothalamic Control of Behavior
Physiology of Sleep, EEG Brain Waves, Epilepsy, and Psychoses
Autonomic Nervous System Organization and Pharmacology
Cerebral Blood Flow, Cerebrospinal Fluid System, and Brain Metabolism

topics.name: Gastrointestinal Motility and Splanchnic Circulation
topics.description: Enteric nervous system control of the gut, mixing/propelling movements, and splanchnic hemodynamics.

subtopics.name: Gastrointestinal Motility and the Enteric Nervous System
Propulsion and Mixing of Food Along the Alimentary Tract
Splanchnic Circulation and Gastrointestinal Blood Flow

topics.name: Gastrointestinal Secretions, Digestion, and Clinical Disorders
topics.description: Secretions (salivary, gastric, pancreatic, biliary), hydrolysis of nutrients, intestinal absorption, and GI disease mechanisms.

subtopics.name: Secretory Functions of the Alimentary Tract
Chemical Digestion of Carbohydrates, Proteins, and Fats by Hydrolysis
Mechanisms of Gastrointestinal Absorption in the Small and Large Intestine
Pathophysiology of Gastrointestinal Disorders

topics.name: Metabolism of Macronutrients and Energetics
topics.description: Carbohydrate glycolysis, lipid transport/oxidation, protein metabolism, plasma proteins, and ATP energetics.

subtopics.name: Carbohydrate Metabolism, Glycolysis, Gluconeogenesis, and ATP Production
Lipid Metabolism: Lipoprotein Transport, Fat Deposits, and Atherosclerosis
Protein Metabolism: Amino Acid Transport and Plasma Proteins
Cellular Energetics, Metabolic Rate, and ATP Currency

topics.name: Hepatic Physiology, Nutritional Balance, and Thermoregulation
topics.description: Vascular/metabolic functions of the liver, appetite feedback, starvation states, vitamins, and hypothalamic body temperature controls.

subtopics.name: Vascular and Metabolic Functions of the Liver
Dietary Balance, Regulation of Feeding, Obesity, Starvation, and Vitamins
Body Temperature Regulation, Heat Exchange, and Fever

topics.name: Principles of Endocrinology and Pituitary Control
topics.description: Chemical classifications of hormones, receptor signaling cascades, hypothalamic control of pituitary output, and growth hormone.

subtopics.name: Hormone Chemical Structure, Synthesis, Transport, and Clearance
Cellular Mechanisms of Hormone Action
The Hypothalamic-Pituitary Axis and Growth Hormone
Posterior Pituitary Hormones and Hypothalamic Relations

topics.name: Thyroid and Adrenal Cortex Endocrinology
topics.description: Thyroxine/triiodothyronine kinetics, synthesis of aldosterone and cortisol, metabolic effects, and disease pathophysiology.

subtopics.name: Synthesis, Secretion, and Physiological Actions of Thyroid Hormones
Regulation of Thyroid Secretion and Clinical Diseases
Mineralocorticoids: Aldosterone Actions and Regulation
Glucocorticoids: Cortisol Metabolic Actions, Stress, and Adrenal Androgens
Pathophysiology of Adrenocortical Secretion

topics.name: Pancreatic and Calcium Homeostasis Endocrinology
topics.description: Kinetics of insulin and glucagon, diabetes mellitus pathophysiology, parathyroid hormone, calcitonin, Vitamin D, and bone remodeling.

subtopics.name: Insulin and Its Metabolic Effects
Glucagon, Somatostatin, and the Integrated Regulation of Blood Glucose
Pathophysiology of Diabetes Mellitus
Calcium and Phosphate Regulation and Bone Physiology
Vitamin D, Parathyroid Hormone, and Calcitonin Dynamics
Pathophysiology of Parathyroid Hormone and Bone Diseases

topics.name: Reproductive and Hormonal Functions of the Male
topics.description: Spermatogenesis, Leydig and Sertoli cell physiology, testosterone dynamics, erectile mechanics, and pineal gland seasonal functions.

subtopics.name: Spermatogenesis and Sperm Maturation
The Male Sexual Act Mechanics
Testosterone Metabolic Actions and Hypothalamic Control
Abnormalities of Male Sexual Function and Pineal Influence

topics.name: Female Physiology: Ovarian Cycle and Female Hormones
topics.description: Follidulogenesis, monthly gonadotropic secretions, actions of estradiol/progesterone, and cyclic hypothalamic feedback.

subtopics.name: Monthly Ovarian Cycle and Gonadotropic Hormones
Estradiol and Progesterone Physiological Functions
Feedback Regulation of the Female Monthly Rhythm
Abnormalities of Female Secretions and Fertility

topics.name: Pregnancy, Lactation, and Developmental Physiology
topics.description: Fertilization, placental endocrinology (hCG, progesterone, hPL), parturition dynamics, maternal alterations, lactation pathways, and neonatal life adjustments.

subtopics.name: Fertilization, Ovum Maturation, and Early Embryo Nutrition
Placental Functions and Hormones of Pregnancy
Maternal Physiological Adaptations and Parturition Mechanics
Lactation Mechanisms and Hormonal Pathways
Fetal Growth, Organ System Development, and Neonatal Extrauterine Life
Problems of Prematurity and Infantile Growth

topics.name: Sports and Exercise Physiology
topics.description: The adaptive changes in metabolic, vascular, respiratory, and cardiovascular control networks during strenuous muscular activity.

subtopics.name: Muscle Hypertrophy and Energetics During Exercise
Respiratory and Cardiovascular Adjustments in Exercise
Thermoregulatory and Electrolyte Shifts During Sports
